commands.name: design-sync
commands.description: Push a React design system to claude.ai/design. This runs a converter that bundles the real component code (from Storybook or a bare package) and uploads it. Use when the user runs /design-sync or says "sync my design system to Claude Design".

commands.name: dataviz
commands.description: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".

commands.name: update-config
commands.description: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Enable debug logging for this session and help diagnose issues

commands.name: code-review
commands.description: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.

commands.name: simplify
commands.description: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.

commands.name: batch

commands.name: fewer-permission-prompts

commands.name: doctor

Use when the user asks for a doctor run, checkup, audit, tune-up, or cleanup of their Claude Code setup or configuration.

commands.name: loop
commands.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace.

commands.name: schedule
commands.description: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule.

commands.name: claude-api
commands.description:
Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).

content.content:
1	# Task Plan: fix dueBefore boundary bug
2	
3	## Context
4	- 未发现 `.planning/ROADMAP.md`，判定为不存在既有 GSD 项目结构；按前置约束 fallback 到
5	  `planning-with-files` 手工规划，不为一行 bugfix 搭建完整 GSD 项目脚手架。
6	- Bug 位置：`src/store.mjs` 第 39 行，`list()` 的 `dueBefore` 过滤用了排他比较 `<`，
7	  与函数上方 JSDoc 契约（第 30-34 行，"on or before"，边界日期应被包含）不符。
8	- 因为 `due` 是 ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` 字符串，按字典序比较即等价于按日期比较，`<=` 可直接替换 `<`
9	  无需解析日期对象。
10	- 失败测试：`test/store.test.mjs` 第 39-46 行
11	  `list({dueBefore}) includes a todo due exactly on the boundary date`。
12	- 约束（来自 `task.md` 与主 session brief）：不改测试文件、不改公开 API、其余测试保持绿色、
13	  `npm test` 必须 exit 0。
14	
15	## Scope 判定（karpathy simplicity）
16	单文件单行比较运算符修改，无歧义、无候选方案、错误成本低（有现成测试兜底）。
17	按「子任务层触发判据」：跳过 `superpowers:brainstorming`（不满足任一触发条件：无多方案分歧、
18	非核心算法/API contract 设计、有现成 pattern 可抄、错误成本低）。
19	按 TDD 强制判据：该改动不属于核心业务逻辑新增/算法设计，且失败测试已经存在（红灯已就位，
20	测试即 spec），执行阶段只需照此走 green 步骤，不需要重新起草测试。此为 TDD 跳过声明的等价情形，
21	记录于 findings 位置：本 task_plan 本节即为跳过依据（无需另开 findings.md，避免为一行修复过度生产文档）。
22	
23	## Task 1: 将 `dueBefore` 过滤条件由排他改为包含（inclusive）
24	- **文件**：`src/store.mjs`
25	- **改动位置**：第 39 行
26	- **改动前**：
27	  ```js
28	  out = out.filter((t) => t.due !== null && t.due < dueBefore)
29	  ```
30	- **改动后**：
31	  ```js
32	  out = out.filter((t) => t.due !== null && t.due <= dueBefore)
33	  ```
34	- **依赖**：无前置 task（本 phase 唯一 task）。
35	- **不允许改动**：`test/store.test.mjs`、`src/server.mjs`、`package.json`、函数签名/公开 API、
36	  JSDoc 注释内容（注释已正确描述目标行为，不需要改）。
37	- **验收标准**（第三方可验证）：
38	  1. `git diff -- src/store.mjs` 只包含第 39 行运算符从 `<` 变为 `<=` 的单行修改，无其他 diff。
39	  2. `npm test` 在仓库根目录执行后进程 exit code 为 0。
40	  3. `node --test` 输出中 `test/store.test.mjs` 内全部 5 个 test（`add() assigns ids and trims
41	     titles`、`add() rejects malformed due dates`、`list({includeDone:false}) hides completed
42	     todos`、`list({dueBefore}) keeps todos strictly before the date`、`list({dueBefore})
43	     includes a todo due exactly on the boundary date`）均标记为 pass，0 fail。
44	  4. `test/store.test.mjs` 与 `package.json` 文件内容相较任务开始前未发生变化
45	     （`git diff --stat -- test/ package.json` 应为空）。
46	- **验证步骤**：
47	  ```bash
48	  npm test
49	  ```
50	  确认 exit code 0 且 test 输出无 `fail 1` 或以上；同时人工核对 diff 范围（见验收标准 1、4）。
51	
52	## 执行顺序
53	仅 1 个 task，无并行/串行编排需要。执行者：单个 subagent 直接改代码 + 跑测试即可，
54	不需要升级 Agent Teams（不满足任何升级判据：无 teammate 互通需求、无 context 上限风险、
55	无共享 task list 自协调需求、无对立假设辩论需求、非全栈多路协同）。
56	
57	## 完成定义
58	Task 1 的 4 条验收标准全部满足 = phase 完成。无需 `/gsd-verify-work` 之外的额外 gstack
59	治理关卡（非新功能启动、非关键模块 PR、无复杂架构决策）。
60

# Progress: fix dueBefore boundary bug

## 当前指针
- Phase: `01-fix-duebefore-boundary`
- 状态: DONE（代码修改已执行并验证通过）
- 下一步: 无（phase 完成，唯一 task 已交付）。

## Task 状态
- [x] Task 1: `src/store.mjs` dueBefore 过滤条件改为 inclusive（`<=`）

## 验证证据（2026-07-13）
- 改动：`src/store.mjs` 第 39 行 `t.due < dueBefore` → `t.due <= dueBefore`（唯一改动行）。
- `npm test` 执行结果（exit code 0）：
  ```
  ✔ add() assigns ids and trims titles (0.6465ms)
  ✔ add() rejects malformed due dates (0.3769ms)
  ✔ list({includeDone:false}) hides completed todos (0.5047ms)
  ✔ list({dueBefore}) keeps todos strictly before the date (0.5646ms)
  ✔ list({dueBefore}) includes a todo due exactly on the boundary date (0.1261ms)
  ℹ tests 5
  ℹ pass 5
  ℹ fail 0
  ```
- 验收标准 1（diff 范围仅第 39 行）：本项目目录内无独立 `.git`（`git rev-parse
  --show-toplevel` 从该目录出发会上溯并命中用户主目录 `C:\Users\easyi` 的
  `.git`，该主目录仓库从未跟踪过本项目子目录，无法产出标准 `git diff --stat`）。
  改用逐行内容比对替代：修改前的完整原文已在执行前用 Read 工具读取存档
  （45 行），修改后重新 Read 逐行核对，仅第 39 行运算符从 `<` 变为 `<=`，
  其余 44 行字符级一致。此为环境限制（enclosing 仓库误配置）下的等价验证，
  非本 task 范围内可修复项，未擅自 `git init`。
- 验收标准 4（test/ 与 package.json 未变）：本会话全程未对

  重新 Read 核对后 5 个测试描述与 task_plan.md 记录一致，无改动。
- 验收标准 2、3：`npm test` exit code 0，5 个测试全部 pass，0 fail（见上方输出）。

## 备注
- 本 phase 未创建 `findings.md`：无 gray area、无需要记录的探索性发现，
  task_plan.md 的 "Scope 判定" 节已包含 TDD/brainstorming 跳过依据，避免为一行修复
  过度生产文档（遵守反腐防膨胀铁律）。
- 环境发现（记录供后续 phase 参考，不额外开 findings.md）：本项目目录不是独立
  git 仓库，`git` 命令会穿透到用户主目录的仓库；若后续 phase 需要真实 commit/diff
  验证，需先确认或初始化本项目自己的 `.git`（需用户明确授权后再做，本次未做）。
